extraction.one_line_summary: PINOT attacked inside 500m on Tourmalet summit finish, dropped ALAPHILIPPE and BERNAL in final meters after Movistar's tempo destroyed QUINTANA 6.5 miles from summit
tactical_patterns: Movistar's Soler tempo on Tourmalet eliminated their own leader Quintana 10km from summit, revealing catastrophic team dysfunction
Thomas lost 36 seconds despite sitting wheels in final group, showing weakness even without attacks—not the form expected
Pinot's late acceleration inside 500m proved more effective than earlier attacks, suggesting summit finishes reward patience over distance attacks

rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: dropped by own team's tempo 10km from summit on Tourmalet, losing 2+ minutes despite being pre-stage GC contender
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: lost 36s without being attacked, sitting wheels in final group—defending champion showing alarming weakness when simply following
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: positive: took 2nd plus time bonuses despite being pure puncheur, extending GC lead to 2+ minutes when expected to crack
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: positive: late 500m acceleration on Tourmalet summit dropped pure climbers Bernal/Alaphilippe after earlier failed attack was neutralized
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: neutral: marked moves but couldn't counter Pinot's final kick, suggesting sprint weakness on summit finishes despite climbing strength
rider_signals.KRUIJSWIJK Steven: neutral: finished in lead group but faded to 3rd in GC as others took time bonuses
rider_signals.SOLER Marc: negative: paced so hard for Movistar he dropped own leader Quintana, then had to abandon tempo to help
